hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q '/sshfs-keeper/'; then cd /home/miro/PycharmProjects/sshfs-keeper && systemctl --user stop sshfs-keeper 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; rm -rf build/ dist/ *.egg-info && uv tool install --force . --no-cache && systemctl --user start sshfs-keeper 2>/dev/null; fi || true
